description: Nuxt UI is a Vue UI component library, usable with Nuxt or plain Vue, that provides accessible Tailwind CSS-based components, composables, templates, and documentation. The ui.nuxt.com site hosts its documentation and AI-assistant resources for exploring the component library.
summary: ui.nuxt.com exposes a public MCP server at `https://ui.nuxt.com/mcp`; no HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or standalone CLI integration surface was documented on this domain.
